perksWithImages.name: Bamboozle
perksWithImages.description:
Your vault speed is {0}% faster.

Performing a vault action calls upon The Entity to block that vault location to Survivors for {1} seconds.

Only 1 vault location may be blocked in this way at any time.

Does not affect pallets.

perksWithImages.name: Leverage
perksWithImages.description: Whenever a Survivor unhooks another or themselves, they heal {Tunable.K31P03.HealPenalty%}% slower for {Tunable.K31P03.ReduceHealingDuration}s.

perksWithImages.name: Left Behind
perksWithImages.description:
Unlocks potential in one's aura reading ability.

If you are the last Survivor remaining in the trial, you can see the aura of the Hatch within a {0} meter range.

perksWithImages.name: Troubleshooter
perksWithImages.description:
While chased by the Killer:
  • You see the Aura of the Generator with the most progress.
  • Whenever you drop a Pallet, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S37P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.


When the Killer stops chasing you, this ends after {Tunable.S37P01.LingeringDuration}s.
